Part.Source: Event Start Tablepercent.Visible = false tbResult.Visible = false LoadWWpContext.Call(&Context) DpFilialAcesso.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, &sdtFilialAcesso) For &sdtFilialAcessoItem in &sdtFilialAcesso &ManFilCod.AddItem(&sdtFilialAcessoItem.PesFilAce, &sdtFilialAcessoItem.PesFilAceNom) EndFor &PesCod = &Context.PesCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMain.Width = 1200 TableMain.Height = 700 &NomeTemporario.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows &ManNfCte = nullvalue(&ManNfCte) &ManSts = nullvalue(&ManSts) Form.Caption = ' Manifestação de Documentos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ // if &PedCod > 0 // &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get('ImportarXmlCompra_Data')) // &DeOndeVem = &WizardData.SelecionarXML.DeOndeVem // &PedCod = &WizardData.SelecionarXML.PedCod // &PedFilCod = &WizardData.SelecionarXML.PedFilCod // &PedCliCodRaz = &WizardData.SelecionarXML.PedCliCodRaz // &ManRaz = RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(&WizardData.SelecionarXML.PedCliCpfCnpj) // Endif if &ManDta.IsEmpty() &ManDta_To = serverdate() &ManDta = &ManDta_To.AddDays(-30) Endif if &ManDta_To.IsEmpty() &ManDta_To = serverdate() &ManDta = &ManDta_To.AddDays(-30) Endif &NomeTemporario.FromString(&WebSession.Get('PARM')) EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' ManNro.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ManTip.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ManSitNFe.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ManSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &PesCnpj = ManCpfCnpj &FormatadoPesCnpj = ManCpfCnpj RetornaSoNumeros.Call(&PesCnpj, &PesCnpj) if not &FormatadoPesCnpj.IsEmpty() ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&FormatadoPesCnpj, &Erro, 'N') EndIF &NfeEmpCod = EmpCod do 'getFornecedor' &NfeNum = ManNro &ManCod = trim(str(ManModCod)) VerificaNotaJahLancadaCTe.Call(EmpCod, ManFilCod, Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS, &NfeCliCod, &NfeNum, ManSer, &ManCod, 0, &NfeCod ) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &zssdd = !'' &groupaction.Clear() &groupaction.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &groupaction.AddItem(1, 'Consultar NFe') If (not ManXmlNfe.trim().IsEmpty()) &groupaction.AddItem(2, 'Imprimir NFe') Endif If (not ManXmlNfe.trim().IsEmpty()) &groupaction.AddItem(3, 'Exporta Xml') Endif &groupaction.AddItem(4, 'Excluir registro') if ManRaz.Length() >= 25 &auxManRaz = Substr(ManRaz,1,25) + '...' Else &auxManRaz = ManRaz Endif ManNro.ColumnClass = iif(&NfeCod > 0, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') Do Case Case ManTip = EntradaSaida.Entrada ManTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case ManTip = EntradaSaida.Saida ManTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Otherwise ManTip.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case ManSitNFe = Situacao_Nfe.AUTORIZADO ManSitNFe.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case ManSitNFe = Situacao_Nfe.DENEGADA ManSitNFe.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case ManSitNFe = Situacao_Nfe.CANCELADA ManSitNFe.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise ManSitNFe.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case ManSts = Status_DFe.NaoManifestado ManSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case ManSts = Status_DFe.Confirmacao ManSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case ManSts = Status_DFe.Desconhecido ManSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case ManSts = Status_DFe.Ciencia ManSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case ManSts = Status_DFe.NaoRealizada ManSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise ManSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase &ManCodWithTags.HorizontalAlignment = !'Right' &ManCodWithTags = trim(ManCod.ToFormattedString()) If ManXmlNfe.trim().IsEmpty() &ManCodWithTags = format(!"", "Sem Xml") + &ManCodWithTags EndIf If Not ManXmlNfe.trim().IsEmpty() &ManCodWithTags = format(!"", "Com Xml") + &ManCodWithTags EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &zssdd.Visible = 1 EndEvent Event &groupaction.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &groupaction = 1 Do 'Do ConsultaSefaz' Case &groupaction = 2 Do 'Do GeraNota' Case &groupaction = 3 Do 'Do ExportarXml' Case &groupaction = 4 Do 'Do ExcluirRegistro' EndCase &groupaction = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_ExcluirRegistro.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_ExcluirRegistro.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action ExcluirRegistro' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'Doaction' wpConf03.Popup() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSincronizarCte' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ SincronizarCte_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event SincronizarCte_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcManifestacaoDestinatario.Create(&EmpCod, &ManFilCod, 'CTE') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event SincronizarCte_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'Do ConsultaSefaz' If not ManCha.Trim().IsEmpty() GravaConsultaSEFAZ.Call('WWMANIFESTACAO1', EmpCod, ManFilCod, ManCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) wpConsultaSefazNota.Link('WWMANIFESTACAO1', EmpCod, ManFilCod, ManCod, &SolCod) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do GeraNota' GeraPdfDacte_Manifestacao.Call(EmpCod, ManCod, &UrlPDF, &UrlFisico) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = Link(&UrlPDF) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExportarXml' If not ManXmlNfe.Trim().IsEmpty() &NomArq = &SdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis+ trim(ManCha)+'.xml' &file.Source = &NomArq If &file.Exists() &file.Delete() EndIf &ResultadoAbertura = DfwOpen(&NomArq,'','', 0, 'ISO-8859-1') &ResultadoNext = dfwptxt(ManXmlNfe) // Grava Linha &ResultadoNext = DFWNext() &ResultadoAbertura = dfwclose() &link = &SdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempVir+ trim(ManCha)+'.xml' link(&link) Else Msg('ATENÇÃO! Arquivo Xml vazio contate o suporte.') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExcluirRegistro' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &ManCod_Selected = ManCod DVelop_ConfirmPanel_ExcluirRegistro.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Action ExcluirRegistro' prcAtualizaManifestacaoExcluido.Call(&EmpCod_Selected, &ManCod_Selected) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MANFILCOD" &ManFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MANDTA" &ManDta.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &ManDta_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MANNFCTE" &ManNfCte.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MANSTS" &ManSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MANRAZ" &ManRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' if &ManDta.IsEmpty() &ManDta_To = serverdate() &ManDta = &ManDta_To.AddDays(-30) Endif if &ManDta_To.IsEmpty() &ManDta_To = serverdate() &ManDta = &ManDta_To.AddDays(-30) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"MANFILCOD", "", not &ManFilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &ManFilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"MANDTA", "", not (&ManDta.IsEmpty() AND &ManDta_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &ManDta.ToString().Trim(), &ManDta_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"MANNFCTE", "", not &ManNfCte.IsEmpty(), 0, &ManNfCte, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"MANSTS", "", not &ManSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &ManSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"MANRAZ", "", not &ManRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &ManRaz, '') SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Manifestacao" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &ManFilCod.IsValid RetornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&EmpCod, &ManFilCod, &SdtConfiguracoesPasta) EndEvent Event scaProgressBar1.OnComplete For Each Order ProgressId Where ProgressId = &ProgressId txtMsg.ForeColor = RGB(210,130,0) txtMsg.Caption = ProgressLogXml.Trim() grid.Refresh() Exit EndFor Do 'GetFilial' Tablepercent.Visible = False tbResult.Visible = true EndEvent Event &zssdd.Click If Not ManXmlNfe.trim().IsEmpty() GravaXmlCteTerceiros.Call(&WebSessionKey, EmpCod, '', ManXmlNfe) return Else Msg('ATENÇÃO! Nenhum arquivo xml encontrado, tente fazer o download do xml primeiro.') Endif EndEvent Sub 'getFornecedor' &NfeCliCod.SetEmpty() For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &NfeEmpCod Where PesCnpj = &PesCnpj or PesCnpj = &FormatadoPesCnpj //when &PesCpf.IsEmpty() //Where PesCpf = &PesCpf or PesCpf = &FormatadoPesCpf when &PesCnpj.IsEmpty() &NfeCliCod = PesCod Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'GetFilial' For each order EmpCod,FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &ManFilCod // txtSincronizacao.Caption = 'Sync: ' + trim(toformattedString(FilUltSin)) + '[NFe] NSU:' + trim(str(FilUltNSU)) + ' de ' + trim(str(FilMaxNSU)) txtSincronizacao.Caption = '[CTe] NSU:' + trim(str(FilUltNSUCte)) + ' de ' + trim(str(FilMaxNSUCte)) Exit EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
